nasb.text: Who is wise? Let him give heed to these things, And consider the lovingkindnesses of the Lord.

esv.text: Whoever is wise, let him attend to these things; let them consider the steadfast love of the Lord.

cnv.text: 凡有智慧的，願他留意這些事； 願他思想耶和華的慈愛。 歌一首，大衛的詩。

ccb.text: 有智慧的人都当留心这些事， 思想耶和华的慈爱。

csbs.text: 谁是有智慧的呢？ 愿他留意这些事， 领悟耶和华的慈爱！
